category_sources: Official ebook2cw page describes a command-line program converting plain text ebooks to Morse MP3 or OGG audio files.
source_facts.description says it converts ebooks to morse code.
display_name_sources: Official project page title uses ebook2cw.
docs_sources: Official project page contains command-line parameters, usage, configuration, download, and source repository information.
repo_sources: Official ebook2cw page states the source code repository is https://git.fkurz.net/dj1yfk/ebook2cw.
tags_sources: Official project page describes MP3/OGG output, command-line parameters, character encodings, and ham radio use.
